history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly in front of me, row 02 column C, is lava (`L`), so I should not move forward. The safe open path is to go downward into row 03 column B, which requires turning clockwise first.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front of me, row 03 column B, is safe (`.`), so the best next move is to advance forward toward the open corridor that can eventually lead around the lava to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

<thought>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right. The cell ahead E02 is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. To avoid lava, I should turn counter-clockwise to face up? No, that would still not help. The safe adjacent floor is D03 below, so from facing right I need to rotate clockwise twice to face down before moving, but since only one action is allowed now, I should first turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>

GIRA_HORARIO
